steps.t: Tasgall's camp-site is north of Aughaire and south-east of Nád Nathair. You and Tasgall were successful in your hunt of Bangrath and Murragrath. He is…
Rona is at the centre island of Aughaire, east of Crannog's ruling-seat. Tasgall has been satisfied with the aid you lent him and wants you to tell hi…
